rationale: C1 stays out of the mainline because it is a stable partial + extreme conditioning sample: the raw autoregressive template persists, but formal support never matures into an entry path.
D2 is not a mainline entry because it is a stable raw template + empty mask sample under extreme conditioning, which keeps the structure as boundary evidence rather than a usable entry.
